title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Clustering by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Adjusted Rand Index (ARI)
steps.summary: ** Adjusted Rand Index (ARI) belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Clustering / Core Models. Start after index models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: index models
